command.text: declare @message varchar(1024) select @message = 'this._isAdmin=' + rtrim(@@admin) + ';this._userID=' + rtrim(@@userID) + ';this._pass='''';initForm(this);' &ProfileShowing; if &ChatFlag; = 0 select @message = @message + 'setObjectFormHidden(this, ''nickname'');setObjectFormHidden(this, ''chat_ns_yn'');' select @message as message return

&Key; declare @wl varchar(8000), @trial varchar(1) select @wl = list from blwords where 1 = 1 select @trial = case when exists(select 1 from @@appDatabaseName..options where name = 'm_sys_trial' and val = '1') then '1' else '0' end select 'this._key = ''' + @rk + ''';this._wordList = ''' + @wl + ''';this._trial = ' + @trial + ';loadForm(this);' as message return

declare @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$updateDeny nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512), @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$script varchar(64), @$nickNameExists nvarchar(512) select @$updateDeny = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mật khẩu xác nhận không đúng.' else N'Confirmation password is invalid.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mật khẩu không được phép trùng mật khẩu cũ.' else N'Old password must not be reused.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Không thể xóa người quản trị.' else N'Can not delete the administrator account.' end select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Tên %s đã có trong danh sách người sử dụng.' else N'The name %s already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Tên %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The name %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end select @$script = 'revertPassword(this, "%s");' select @$nickNameExists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Biệt danh đã tồn tại.' else N'Nickname already exists.' end &ProfileDeclareVar;

#IF @@admin <> 1 #THEN return #END declare @hash varchar(32), @c bit, @d bit, @k varchar(6) exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$CheckSum @@userID, @$chkpass, 0, @c output if @c = 0 begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'cpass' as field, @$updateDeny as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'cpass') as script return end if exists(select 1 from @@table where name = @name) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'name' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', @name) as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'name') as script return end if exists(select 1 from userinfo where name = @name) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'name' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', @name) as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'name') as script return end if @nickname <> '' and exists (select 1 from @@table where nickname = @nickname) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'nickname' as field, @$nickNameExists as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'nickname') as script return end &Check; select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID /*

*/ declare @invoke nvarchar(4000) exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$CreateUser @name, @comment, @dien_thoai, @e_mail, @d_language, @alz_yn, @restrict_users, @pwd_type, @pwd_daychange, @pwd_nextlogin_yn, @pwd_useold_yn, @restrict_yn, @status, @@userID update @@table set nickname = @nickname, chat_ns_yn = @chat_ns_yn&DeviceUserInserted; where name = @name select @invoke = 'User.Update.Password(' + rtrim(@@userID) + ', ' + @name + ', ' + @$pass + ')' select @id = id from @@table where name = @name &ProfileInserted; select '' as message, @id as id, @invoke as invoke return

&Check;
#IF @@admin <> 1 #THEN declare @oldName varchar(128) select @oldName = $name.OldValue if @oldName <> @name and exists(select 1 from @@table where id = @@userID and name = @oldName) return if not exists(select 1 from @@table where id = @@userID and name = @oldName) begin if ((select charindex(rtrim(@oldName), restrict_users) from @@table where id = @@userID) = 0) return end if not exists(select 1 from @@table where (id = @@userID or id = @id) and restrict_users = @restrict_users) return if @admin = 1 return #END declare @v bit exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$CheckSum @@userID, @$chkpass, 0, @v output if @v = 0 begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'cpass' as field, @$updateDeny as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'cpass') as script return end if @$pwd_update_yn <> 0 begin declare @hash varchar(32), @c bit, @d bit, @k varchar(6) exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$CheckSum @@userID, @$chkpass, 0, @c output if @$chkdup <> 0 exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$CheckSum @@userID, @$chkdup, 1, @d output else set @d = 0 if @c = 0 begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'cpass' as field, @$updateDeny as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'cpass') as script return end if @d = 1 begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'view_pass' as field, @$updateConflict as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'view_pass') as script return end end if not exists(select 1 from @@table where name = $name.OldValue) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'name' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($name.OldValue)) as message return end if @name <> $name.OldValue begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where name like rtrim(@name)) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'name' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@name)) as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'name') as script return end if exists(select 1 from userinfo where name like rtrim(@name)) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'name' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@name)) as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'name') as script return end end if not exists(select 1 from userinfo where name = $name.OldValue) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'name' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($name.OldValue)) as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'name') as script return end if @nickname <> '' and exists(select 1 from @@table where nickname = @nickname and name <> $name.OldValue) begin &ProfileCreateTicketWhenReturn; select 'nickname' as field, @$nickNameExists as message, replace(@$script, '%s', 'nickname') as script return end

declare @invoke nvarchar(4000) select @invoke = ''
if @$pwd_update_yn <> 0 begin select @invoke = 'User.Update.Password(' + rtrim(@@userID) + ', ' + @name + ', ' + @$pass + ')' end &ProfileInserted; if @invoke <> '' select '' as message, @invoke as invoke
update userinfo set comment = @comment, comment2 = @comment, name = @name, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID, status = @status where name = $name.OldValue if @name <> $name.OldValue exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$UpdateUser $name.OldValue, @name
#IF @@admin <> 1 #THEN return #END declare @isAdmin tinyint select @isAdmin = admin from @@table where name = @name if @isAdmin = 1 begin select @$deleteConflict as message return end

declare @userID int select @userID = id from userinfo where name = rtrim(@name) exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$UpdateUser @name, '' exec dbo.FastBusiness$System$UpdateRights4DeleteUser @userID, @@appDatabaseName &ProfileDeleted;
